raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I placed an order from XXXX XXXX totaling {$280.00}. The company failed to respond and never shipped the order. I tried contacting XXXX  around XX/XX/XXXX and did not receive a response. I attempted to dispute the charge with Citicards on XX/XX/XXXX and received a temporary credit reversal. However, Citicards reversed the credit and sided with XXXX  despite the company failing to fulfill the order. I followed up with Citicards and provided additional information on XX/XX/XXXX showing that the company is a scam, but Citicards refused to advocate on my behalf because XXXX  refused to cooperate and did not provide a credit slip to Citicards
